name: LearningFlowCompleted

neutralConcepts: 'LearningFlowCompleted' is a MACHINE literal string constant
completion gates on Branch A only: T85 committed + T96 done + T87 done
Branch B (LearningPlanAdapted) NOT in gate condition
Branch C (QuestionnairePostDistributed) NOT in gate condition

ironRules.rule: 'LearningFlowCompleted' must be declared as a MACHINE string literal constant — never dynamic, never configurable.
Completion gate condition = Branch A complete: T85 (ledger committed) + T96 (streak done) + T87 (achievement checked). Branch A is the gate.
Branch B (LearningPlanAdapted) is NOT in the LearningFlowCompleted gate. Branch B emits independently.
Branch C (QuestionnairePostDistributed) is NOT in the LearningFlowCompleted gate. Branch C emits independently.

keywords: learning flow completed completion gate branch A T85 T96 T87 time decoupled branches
